NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100123681) FILED BY DEFENDANT JANG, RYAN CHRISTOPHER HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-2021 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-30-2021 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-30-2021 HEARINGS RE: 1.) DEFENDANT RYAN JANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; 2.) DEFENDANT RYAN JANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; 3.) DEFENDANT RYAN JANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULINGS. THE UNOPPOSED MOTIONS OF DEFENDANT RYAN CHRISTOPHER YANG FOR ORDERS COMPELLING PLAINTIFF BILLY J. SNOOK TO PROVIDE COMPLETE AND FULLY CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) ARE GRANTED WITH ALL SUCH RESPONSES DUE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE TERM "CODE-COMPLIANT" MEANS IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CALIFORNIA CIVIL DISCOVERY ACT, CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 2016.010 ET SEQ., AS INTERPRETED BY THE DECISIONS OF THE COURTS OF THIS STATE. THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR THE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED BY DEFENDANT IN BRINGING THE MOTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $918 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A SINGLE PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
(DUPLICATIVE DISPOSITION ENTRY.)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RYAN JANG's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motions of Defendant Ryan Christopher Yang for orders compelling Plaintiff Billy J. Snook to provide complete and fully code-compliant responses without objections to defendant's form interrogatories (set one), special interrogatories (set one) and requests for production (set one) are granted with all such responses due within 30 days of the date of this Order. The term "code-compliant" means in compliance with the California Civil Discovery Act, Code of Civil Procedure sections 2016.010 et seq., as interpreted by the decisions of the courts of this state. The Court further awards sanctions against plaintiff for the fees and costs incurred by defendant in bringing the motions in the amount of $918 to be paid within 30 days of the date of this Order.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a single proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
